home.label: Full-Stack Developer · Journalist · Business Communication Specialist
home.quote: There's no such thing as "I don't know", only "let's find out how".

about.label: about me
about.quote: "The art of communication is the language of leadership"
about.author: — James Humes
about.p1: Humes was right. Only through effective and honest communication can we achieve our goals, both personally and professionally.
about.p2: I have developed this vocation for over a decade, combining work experience with continuous training. I enjoy designing communication strategies, their visual elements, and everything related to conveying a brand's identity. A company's value doesn't lie in numbers, but in the emotions it creates.
about.p3a: After spending over ten years dedicated exclusively to business communication, I decided to expand my horizons and add another branch to my knowledge:
about.p3b: . Working with both front-end and back-end languages, the communicational experience I can now offer is complete: starting from scratch, we can build an entire corporate identity, design the strategy, and execute it.

safemap.title: SafeMap
safemap.description: Collaborative map where users flag dangerous or low-accessibility areas to help travelers.

safemap.label: bootcamp final project
safemap.p1: Traveling and exploring the world has become commonplace today. Distances feel short and the interconnected world we live in lets us visit places that, not long ago, could only be dreamed of.
safemap.p2: But once we're there — do we know how to get around? How do we get back without running into accessibility issues or dangerous areas?
safemap.p3b: : a map where users can place "red flags" on public spaces or streets to warn other users of the application.
